subcodes.first_line: O beloved Persian Joseph! The contentious ones have seized thee in the Egypt of the Covenant, and cast thee at times into the well of calumnies [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یوسف فارسی عزیز مصر میثاق در دست اهل شقاق گرفتار گهی در چاه مفتریات مسجون
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @suffering and imprisonment
